name: Andrew Clyde
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $10,900 for Andrew Clyde in U.S. House, GA-09. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
